blocks.text: Match preview: Sri Lanka A face India A in 2nd Unofficial Test (TEST) on Thu, 2 Jul, 2026, 10:00 am at Galle International Stadium Galle. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Sri Lanka A vs India A
India A tour of Sri Lanka 2026

blocks.text: Spin-friendly Sri Lankan tracks; deteriorate quickly on day 4–5 in Tests.
Light drizzle · High 30°C / Low 26°C · Rain: 1.2 mm · Wind: up to 21 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
